you ever felt that the more work you give AI, the dumber it gets?\n\nIt’s not just your imagination. There is a clear reason, and there is a solution.\n\nThis video combines the 'Code with Claude' workshop released by Anthropic with my own experiences building ConGen, Remotion, and Marketing Agent to explain how solo makers can truly make the most of AI.\n\nThe key is in a single line:\n\n\"Don't give the AI ​​everything at once.\"\n\nAnd as AI gets smarter, its most powerful weapon is your 'domain knowledge.'\n\n━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\n\n📌 Chapter\n\n00:00 The Phenomenon of AI Becoming Stupid the More You Give It Work\n\n00:45 What Happens When System Prompts Get Longer\n\n01:50 StockPilot Case Study — Anthropic Workshop\n\n02:40 Solution 1. Breaking It Down into Skills\n\n04:00 One-Line Cheat Code Prompt\n\n04:30 6 Principles of Writing System Prompts\n\n06:00 5 Principles of Writing Skills\n\n08:30 Solution 2. Use Only What Is Absolutely Necessary for MCPs\n\n09:30 Solution 3. Sub-agents in Only Two Cases\n\n11:00 Conclusion — The AI ​​Era, Humans' Real Weapons\n\n12:00 Group Chat / Offline Meeting Information\n\n━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\n\n💬 Those Who Want to Build Together\n\nSharing AI + Domain Knowledge Projects Together I am running a KakaoTalk group chat and offline meetups that I am creating.\n\nPlease feel free to drop by.\n\n🔗 Join the group chat: https://open.kakao.com/o/p5e52dhi\n\n━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\n\nA single like gives me the strength to create the next episode.\n\nPlease feel free to subscribe only if you would like to watch the next experiment with me.\n\n━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\n\n#Automation #AIAutomation #Claude #ClaudeCode #SideHustle more"}},"simpleText":"...more"},"showLessText":{"simpleText":"Show less"},"attributedDescriptionBodyText":{"content":"Have you ever felt that the more work you give AI, the dumber it gets?\n\nIt’s not just your imagination. There is a clear reason, and there is a solution.\n\nThis video combines the 'Code with Claude' workshop released by Anthropic with my own experiences building ConGen, Remotion, and Marketing Agent to explain how solo makers can truly make the most of AI.\n\nThe key is in a single line:\n\n\"Don't give the AI ​​everything at once.\"\n\nAnd as AI gets smarter, its most powerful weapon is your 'domain knowledge.'\n\n━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\n\n📌 Chapter\n\n00:00 The Phenomenon of AI Becoming Stupid the More You Give It Work\n\n00:45 What Happens When System Prompts Get Longer\n\n01:50 StockPilot Case Study — Anthropic Workshop\n\n02:40 Solution 1. Breaking It Down into Skills\n\n04:00 One-Line Cheat Code Prompt\n\n04:30 6 Principles of Writing System Prompts\n\n06:00 5 Principles of Writing Skills\n\n08:30 Solution 2. Use Only What Is Absolutely Necessary for MCPs\n\n09:30 Solution 3. Sub-agents in Only Two Cases\n\n11:00 Conclusion — The AI ​​Era, Humans' Real Weapons\n\n12:00 Group Chat / Offline Meeting Information\n\n━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\n\n💬 Those Who Want to Build Together\n\nSharing AI + Domain Knowledge Projects Together I am running a KakaoTalk group chat and offline meetups that I am creating.\n\nPlease feel free to drop by.\n\n🔗 Join the group chat: https://open.kakao.com/o/p5e52dhi\n\n━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\n\nA single like gives me the strength to create the next episode.\n\nPlease feel free to subscribe only if you would like to watch the next experiment with me.\n\n━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\n\n#Automation #AIAutomation #Claude #ClaudeCode #SideHustle "textPrimary":4292733181,"textSecondary":4287936244,"invertedBackground":4285701869,"overlayBackground":3422754621},"colorSampledDescriptionBodyText":{"content":"Have you ever felt that the more work you give AI, the dumber it gets?\n\nIt’s not just your imagination. There is a clear reason, and there is a solution.\n\nThis video combines the 'Code with Claude' workshop released by Anthropic with my own experiences building ConGen, Remotion, and Marketing Agent to explain how solo makers can truly make the most of AI.\n\nThe key is in a single line:\n\n\"Don't give the AI ​​everything at once.\"\n\nAnd as AI gets smarter, its most powerful weapon is your 'domain knowledge.'\n\n━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\n\n📌 Chapter\n\n00:00 The Phenomenon of AI Becoming Stupid the More You Give It Work\n\n00:45 What Happens When System Prompts Get Longer\n\n01:50 StockPilot Case Study — Anthropic Workshop\n\n02:40 Solution 1. Breaking It Down into Skills\n\n04:00 One-Line Cheat Code Prompt\n\n04:30 6 Principles of Writing System Prompts\n\n06:00 5 Principles of Writing Skills\n\n08:30 Solution 2. Use Only What Is Absolutely Necessary for MCPs\n\n09:30 Solution 3. Sub-agents in Only Two Cases\n\n11:00 Conclusion — The AI ​​Era, Humans' Real Weapons\n\n12:00 Group Chat / Offline Meeting Information\n\n━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\n\n💬 Those Who Want to Build Together\n\nSharing AI + Domain Knowledge Projects Together I am running a KakaoTalk group chat and offline meetups that I am creating.\n\nPlease feel free to drop by.\n\n🔗 Join the group chat: https://open.kakao.com/o/p5e52dhi\n\n━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\n\nA single like gives me the strength to create the next episode.\n\nPlease feel free to subscribe only if you would like to watch the next experiment with me.\n\n━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━\n\n#Automation #AIAutomation #Claude #ClaudeCode #SideHustle Lab에서는 AI 성능 저하의 원인을 시스템 프롬프트의 과부하로 진단하고, 이를 최적화하기 위한 구체적인 방법론을 제시합니다. 스킬 활용법, MCP 관리, 서브 에이전트 설계 등 프로젝트의 효율을 극대화하여 AI와 도메인 지식을 성공적으로 결합하는 실무 중심의 전략을 확인해
